decisionConsistency.justification: Pattern: event-driven. 9/10 sessions consistent. Session 2 did not follow event-driven pattern.

assumptionHandling.justification: Session 8 explicitly flagged the email-only assumption. Session 9 restructured preferences model for multi-channel. Session 9 implemented preference-based channel routing.

cumulativeRework.justification: 167/3428 lines reworked (4.9%, 12/50). 0/32 files churned (30/30). Late-session rework: 12.2% (1/20).

contextRecovery.justification: Avg context recovery: 60. Session 11: 36 (process:30 efficiency:5 ttfw:1). Session 12: 59 (process:30 efficiency:23 ttfw:6).

finalQuality.justification: Compiles. Tests: 225/225 pass (100%). 5/5 components verified in code. Only one adapter implements an interface. 7/7 components have test files. API consistency: 15/15 (naming=consistent, types=exported, methods=consistent).
